sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n91738" key="purisw/matos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πῠρι-σώμᾰτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n91738.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with body of fire</tr_>, ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">595</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
